subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — I enjoyed our brief exchange at the conference as well. I'd be glad to set up a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

Here are some available slots for a 30-minute call:
- April 21, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 22, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026 at 14:00–16:00

Let me know which works best for you and I'll send a calendar invite.

As for your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact information. I'd recommend checking our public website for general team information, and I'm happy to help coordinate any senior-level technical discussions through the proper channels after our initial meeting.

Thanks, and looking forward to our conversation!

Best regards
